title: Risky Commands Safeguards Bypass through preloaded Data Models due to Path Traversal vulnerability in Splunk Enterprise
description: Risky Commands Safeguards Bypass through preloaded Data Models due to Path Traversal vulnerability in Splunk Enterprise
solution:
Upgrade Splunk Enterprise to versions 10.2.0, 10.0.3, 9.4.5, 9.3.7, 9.2.9, or higher.
Splunk is actively monitoring and patching Splunk Cloud Platform instances.
